hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-white

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Break standard symmetry. Use Bento grids for dashboards.

button.primary: bg-[#FFD60A] text-black hover:bg-[#FFC300] font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-transform active:scale-95
button.secondary: bg-zinc-900 text-white border border-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-800 rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-transform active:scale-95
button.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800/50 rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors

card.course: bg-[#121214] border border-zinc-800/50 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden group hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.5)]
card.dashboard_stat: bg-[#121214] border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.text: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-white rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FFD60A] focus:border-transparent transition-all outline-none
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-zinc-400 mb-2

components.navbar: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#09090B]/80 border-b border-zinc-800/50
components.badges: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold bg-[#FFD60A]/10 text-[#FFD60A]

landing.hero: Asymmetric layout. 60% left text/CTA, 40% right overlapping images with slight rotation. Overlay subtle noise texture on background.
landing.testimonials: Marquee strategy - slow, continuous scroll using react-fast-marquee.

auth.layout: Split screen. Left: Beautiful cinematic image with dark overlay. Right: Centered form with max-w-md.
auth.toggles: Pill-shaped toggle for Student vs Instructor signup.

catalog.layout: Sidebar filters (sticky, 25% width), Course grid (75% width, 2-3 columns with generous gap-8).

course_detail.hero: Full width dark banner, massive title, instructor info, stats.
course_detail.content: Two columns: 70% left (curriculum accordion, reviews), 30% right (sticky purchase card, video preview, add to cart/wishlist).

dashboards.student: Bento Grid layout. Top row: Welcome + Quick stats. Middle: Active course player widget. Bottom: Wishlist/Recommendations.
dashboards.instructor: Bento grid mode B (dense). Left: Revenue chart. Top right: Total students. Bottom right: Recent reviews list. Instructor 'Add Course' is a multi-step wizard.

course_player.layout: Fluid width. Left 25%: Collapsible curriculum sidebar. Right 75%: Video player (16:9), tabs for overview, Q&A, and reviews.

motion.page_transitions: Framer motion: initial={opacity: 0, y: 10} animate={opacity: 1, y: 0}.
motion.hover_states: Scale up images slightly inside overflow-hidden wrappers (group-hover:scale-105). Add subtle inner glow to cards.

course_coding.description: Code on dark screen for programming courses

empty_states.style: Centered content with dashed border container bg-[#121214]. Soft gray icon (w-12 h-12). Headline in white, subtext in zinc-400. One primary CTA.
empty_states.loading: Skeleton loaders using animate-pulse. Background of skeletons should be zinc-800/50.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text against #09090B must be at least #A1A1AA for secondary, #FFFFFF for primary. CTA text is #000000 on #FFD60A.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute. E.g., data-testid='enroll-button'.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: NEVER use generic centered layouts or simplistic flat colors without texture. Embrace asymmetry.
DO NOT use generic gradients. Rely on rich, solid #09090B backgrounds with high-contrast yellow (#FFD60A) accents for interaction.
DO NOT apply universal transition like 'transition: all'. Explicitly state 'transition-colors', 'transition-transform'.
DO NOT center align the app container. No '.App { text-align: center; }'.
For interactive logic (calendar, dialogs, dropdowns, popovers), USE Shadcn UI components but heavily customize their Tailwind classes to match the dark theme.
Buttons should be pill-shaped or rounded-full for modern SaaS aesthetic.
NEVER use fully transparent backgrounds for navbars or dropdowns over content. Use backdrop-blur with bg-black/80 or solid #09090B.
Avoid standard 'Bootstrap' columns. Use Tailwind Grid with unequal columns (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4).
Ensure 2-3x more padding than standard presets. Give elements room to breathe (p-8, p-12).
